query:
INSERT INTO decoration_packages (name, description, category, image_url, cost_anom, cost_real) VALUES
('Pixel Badge', 'Unlock the iconic Pixel character badge for your profile', 'character_badge', NULL, '50', '0.99'),
('Dot Badge', 'Unlock the adorable Dot character badge for your profile', 'character_badge', NULL, '50', '0.99'),
('Tater Nugget Badge', 'Unlock the Tater Nugget character badge for your profile', 'character_badge', NULL, '50', '0.99'),
('Happy Glow', 'A cheerful magenta glow that radiates positivity', 'mood_glow', NULL, '25', '0.49'),
('Chill Glow', 'A cool cyan glow for a relaxed vibe', 'mood_glow', NULL, '25', '0.49'),
('Mystical Glow', 'A mysterious purple glow for the enigmatic', 'mood_glow', NULL, '25', '0.49'),
('Magenta Neon Theme', 'Transform your profile with a vibrant magenta neon aesthetic', 'neon_theme', NULL, '100', '1.99'),
('Cyan Neon Theme', 'Embrace the cool cyan neon energy', 'neon_theme', NULL, '100', '1.99'),
('Purple Neon Theme', 'Dive into the deep purple neon realm', 'neon_theme', NULL, '100', '1.99'),
('Social Good Champion', 'Earned by completing 10 social good actions', 'achievement_badge', NULL, '0', '0'),
('Family Hero', 'Earned by spending 5 hours in family lounges', 'achievement_badge', NULL, '0', '0'),
('Game Master', 'Earned by winning 50 mini-games', 'achievement_badge', NULL, '0', '0');
